title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 16 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 16 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 16 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 16/10/2023
DCE iron ore futures market roseing sharply trends by 2.86%. the main contract I2401 closed 862,some traders were active to sell, but steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high but steel mills purchased on demand few transactions is poor. PBF at Shandong port dealt 930-935 yuan/mt; increased 8-10 yuan/mt from last Friday.
